No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or economic resources.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course mentions '運動' (sports) and '醫院' (hospital) as conversational topics. This is a very tangential link to health and well-being, not active promotion.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops language and self-learning skills (Target 4.4).
evidence: 培養同學閱讀、構句以及簡單的會話、翻譯能力
提升學習者的自學精神

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly covers 'アルバイト' (part-time job) as a topic, relating to employment and work environments (Targets 8.3, 8.6).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Learning Japanese culture helps students understand other societies, fostering intercultural understanding that can reduce inequalities (Target 10.2).
evidence: 瞭解日本的文化、習慣等

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Understanding Japanese culture, a course objective, has an inferred link to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course explicitly covers '断捨離' (decluttering), directly linking to waste reduction (Target 12.5) and sustainable lifestyles (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The syllabus explicitly states '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright), supporting the rule of law (Target 16.3).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing basic Japanese communication skills and understanding Japanese culture fosters cross-cultural interaction, a foundation for international cooperation (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
evidence: 具備基礎日語溝通能力
